basic_details.job_title: IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: IIT (BHU) Varanasi is recruiting 01 Junior Research Fellow in the Department of Civil Engineering.

important_dates.interview_date: To be communicated to shortlisted candidates

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: Maximum 28 years (relaxation as per GOI norms) | emoluments: ₹37,000 + 20% HRA per month
qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering (min 60% or 6 CGPA) with valid GATE score OR M.E./M.Tech in Civil Engineering (Structural Engineering) with min 60% or 6 CGPA and GATE qualified

how_to_apply: Self-attested copies of all mark sheets and certificates
Email to: [email protected] Subject Line: “Application for the position of JRF”
Send only a single PDF file. Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Original documents must be produced at the time of interview.
Contact: Dr. Mahendra Kumar Pal Email: [email protected]
important_instructions: Only shortlisted candidates will be informed. No hard copy is required. The PI reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates for interview.

content_sections.heading: IIT BHU Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: IIT (BHU) Varanasi is recruiting 01 Junior Research Fellow in the Department of Civil Engineering.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_bhu_varan: AI-Driven Predictive Modeling of Concrete Bunker Failure Under War Head Penetration Loads
Initially 1 year, extendable up to 2 years

rows.date: To be communicated to shortlisted candidates

rows.details: B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering (min 60% or 6 CGPA) with valid GATE score OR M.E./M.Tech in Civil Engineering (Structural Engineering) with min 60% or 6 CGPA and GATE qualified
Maximum 28 years (relaxation as per GOI norms)

content_sections.heading: Job Description & Opportunity
content_sections.text: The selected candidate will work on AI-Driven Predictive Modeling of Concrete Bunker Failure. Opportunity to enroll for Ph.D. in Civil Engineering at IIT (BHU) Varanasi while working as JRF.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for IIT BHU JRF 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates should send: Filled application form Recent CV Self-attested copies of all mark sheets and certificates Email to: [email protected] Subject Line: “Application for the position of JRF” Send only a single PDF file. Shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. Original documents must be produced at the time of interview. Contact: Dr. Mahendra Kumar Pal Email: [email protected]

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only shortlisted candidates will be informed. No hard copy is required. The PI reserves the right to restrict the number of candidates for interview.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT BHU JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The last date of application is 30 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many JRF vacancies are there at IIT BHU Varanasi?
faq.answer: 01 vacancy for Junior Research Fellow in Civil Engineering.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for JRF at IIT BHU?
faq.answer: Emoluments are ₹37,000 + 20% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for IIT BHU AI-Driven Concrete Bunker Project?
faq.answer: B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering with GATE OR M.E./M.Tech in Structural Engineering with GATE.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for IIT BHU Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Send filled application form, CV, and documents as a single PDF to [email protected].

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for IIT BHU JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Upper age limit is 28 years (relaxation as per GOI norms).

faq.question: Q7. Is GATE qualification mandatory for IIT BHU JRF?
faq.answer: Yes, GATE score is required for B.Tech/B.E. candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Will selected JRF get PhD opportunity at IIT BHU?
faq.answer: Yes, the candidate may enroll for Ph.D. in Civil Engineering while working as JRF.

faq.question: Q9. What is the project duration for IIT BHU JRF position?
faq.answer: Initially 1 year, extendable up to 2 years based on performance.

faq.question: Q10. What is the project title at IIT BHU Civil Engineering Department?
faq.answer: AI-Driven Predictive Modeling of Concrete Bunker Failure Under War Head Penetration Loads.
